hero.sub: One second and you know who's online, who's playing what. Join the party, share your screen, find your squad — GWH is the only place you need.

about.title: What is Game World Hub?
about.body: Lost a match because you couldn't find a team? Don't know which friends are online right now? Tired of juggling three apps? GWH fixes all of that in one place.

presence.title: Live friend status
presence.desc: See who's online, who's busy, and what each friend is playing right now.

parties.title: Voice parties
parties.desc: Voice rooms for your squad — create, join, and leave with one click.

screen.title: Screen sharing
screen.desc: Stream your game straight to your party while you play.

chat.title: Private & group chat
chat.desc: Instant messages with your friends and groups, anytime.

lfg.title: Looking for group
lfg.desc: Post a request or join players who need one more teammate.

library.title: Steam library & ranks
library.desc: Link Steam to show your games, and track achievements and rank.

download.title: Desktop app for Windows
download.body: Built for your gaming rig: runs alongside your games, detects what you're playing, stays in the system tray, and delivers overlay notifications without touching your browser.
download.p1: Runs in the background with a system tray icon
download.p2: Instant native desktop notifications + in-game overlay
download.p3: Auto-detects your running game and updates your status
download.p5: Offline mode — works without internet, syncs on reconnect
download.p6: Quick access with deep links to parties and chat
download.webNote: Prefer your browser? The full version runs online too.

pricing.title: Plans & perks
pricing.body: Every core feature is free. Upgrade to PRO for the full gaming command center.
pricing.proF1: Animated PRO badge and custom profile
pricing.proF2: Squad tools: bigger voice rooms, roles, scheduled LFG
pricing.proF4: Boosted LFG posts and verified ranks
pricing.note: Pay securely through Salla. Enter your GWH username at checkout.

support.title: Support
support.body: The most common questions — and if you can't find your answer, message us directly.
support.a1: Create a free account with the “Start free” button, then add your friends by username and start your first voice party.
support.a2: Yes — everything available today is completely free. The future PRO tier is optional and won't lock away core features.
support.q3: How do I link my Steam library?
support.a3: From the “Library” page inside the app, link your Steam account and your games and playtime will appear automatically.
support.q4: Voice not working or calls failing?
support.a4: First make sure your browser has microphone permission, then try another network if you can — some networks block calls. If the problem persists, message support and we'll help.
support.cta: Didn't find your answer? Contact support

contact.title: Contact us
contact.body: Questions, suggestions, partnerships — send us an email and we'll get back to you.

footer.tagline: Your social platform for the gaming world.
footer.rights: © {{year}} Game World Hub — All rights reserved.
